channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: 3-year-old California girl hospitalized with acute kidney failure after eating at Costa Mesa spot amid E. coli outbreak, lawsuit claims - Yahoo
item.description:
1. 3-year-old California girl hospitalized with acute kidney failure after eating at Costa Mesa spot amid E. coli outbreak, lawsuit claims  Yahoo
  2. Parents of girl hospitalized after eating at Costa Mesa restaurant sue chain, supplier  Los Angeles Times
  3. Kebab Shop and its beef supplier targeted in E. coli lawsuit  San Diego Union-Tribune
  4. First lawsuit filed in California E. coli outbreak linked to The Kebab Shop  fox5sandiego.com
  5. Father Sues Restaurant on Allegation That 3-Year-Old Suffered Kidney Failure from Contaminated Food  People.com

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 - Anthropic
item.description:
1. Introducing Claude Opus 4.8  Anthropic
  2. Anthropic debuts flagship Claude Opus 4.8 AI model as IPO race with OpenAI heats up  Yahoo Finance
  3. Claude Opus 4.8 is generally available for GitHub Copilot  The GitHub Blog
  4. Anthropic to roll out Claude Mythos in coming weeks, launches Opus 4.8  KSL News
  5. Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool  TechCrunch

item.title: Bad cholesterol slashed 62% by single dose of gene-editing drug in small trial - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Bad cholesterol slashed 62% by single dose of gene-editing drug in small trial  Ars Technica
  2. One-and-Done Heart Disease Prevention? Scientists Show It May Be Possible.  The New York Times
  3. A New, Powerful Cholesterol-Lowering Drug Is on the Horizon  WSJ
  4. A single dose of Lilly's PCSK9 base editor, VERVE-102, reduced PCSK9 by up to 88% and LDL-C by up to 62%, with durable effects supporting its potential as a one-time treatment for hypercholesterolemia  investor.lilly.com
  5. Lilly preps for ph. 2 launch after Verve gene editor cuts cholesterol on par with PCSK9 inhibitors  Fierce Biotech

item.title: US first-quarter GDP growth revised lower to 1.6% pace - Reuters
item.description:
1. US first-quarter GDP growth revised lower to 1.6% pace  Reuters
  2. U.S. GDP Growth Revised Lower for First Quarter  WSJ
  3. U.S. economic growth keeps moving in the wrong direction, despite Team Trump vows  MS NOW
  4. Economy growing slowly as inflation heats up in fresh wave of data  WBFF
  5. An Inside Look at the Q1 2026 GDP Second Estimate  Advisor Perspectives

item.title: Stock Market News, May 28, 2026: Oil Pares Gains as Investors Cling to Hope of Mideast Deal - WSJ
item.description:
1. Stock Market News, May 28, 2026: Oil Pares Gains as Investors Cling to Hope of Mideast Deal  WSJ
  2. Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq drift lower following US strikes near Strait of Hormuz  Yahoo Finance
  3. Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Snowflake, Best Buy, Kohl's, Dollar Tree & more  CNBC
  4. Iran war splits global markets into clear winners and losers  Reuters
  5. Iran War Risks Haven’t Stopped the Market Rally. Why These Investors Are Sitting Out.  Barron's
